name: Chocolate Chunk Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the first four ingredients in a medium bowl and mix well.
3. Stir in the mayonnaise until evenly incorporated.
4. Shape the dough into 2 tablespoonfuls of balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for about 12 minutes.
6. Allow to cool.
